Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/practicas.general_idea: Update IMap import to use the new package location in newer Hazelcast versions.
Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/practicas.why_exists: The class com.hazelcast.core.IMap was moved to com.hazelcast.map.IMap in recent Hazelcast versions; using the old path causes a compile error.

Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/practicas.why_exists: The class com.hazelcast.core.IMap was moved to com.hazelcast.map.IMap in newer Hazelcast versions, causing a compile error if the old import is kept.

Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/processor.general_idea: Replace deprecated AbstractEntryProcessor with the EntryProcessor interface to align with modern Hazelcast API.
Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/processor.why_exists: AbstractEntryProcessor is deprecated in newer Hazelcast versions; using the interface is the required migration path to avoid deprecation warnings and potential future removal.
Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/processor.before:
import com.hazelcast.map.AbstractEntryProcessor;

Lesson7/src/main/java/com/imdg/processor.after:
